label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 3

extraction.one_line_summary: EVENEPOEL Remco won from chasing GC group after KEMNA Lenny caught from breakaway in final kilometers on Andorran summit finish
tactical_patterns: Soudal Quick-Step chased aggressively despite Evenepoel leading race, signaling willingness to spend domestiques for stage wins not just defend.
AYUSO Juan and SOLER Marc attacked repeatedly to soften GC favorites before final kilometer, revealing UAE's aggressive defense strategy.
BARDET Romain attacked 10km from summit on penultimate climb with full descent remaining, showing distance miscalculation on short stage.
KUSS Sepp set extended tempo for Vingegaard/Roglic rather than attacking himself, confirming pure domestique role despite strong climbing form.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: Responded to all attacks and still had sprint to win from select group, extending GC lead to 5 seconds
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: Dropped on penultimate climb before final ascent began, signaling unexpectedly poor climbing form this early in race
rider_signals.UIJTDEBROEKS Cian: negative: Mentioned as suffering and off pace on final climbs despite being protected climber
rider_signals.KEMNA Lenny: neutral: Refused to share breakaway work with Caruso, prioritizing stage win over cooperation but caught anyway
rider_signals.SEPULVEDA Eduardo: negative: Led breakaway trio over penultimate climb but punctured on descent, losing winning opportunity to mechanical
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: positive: Controlled pace for Jumbo's GC riders throughout summit finish, showing willingness to sacrifice own results
